name: Cranberry Liqueur
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar and water in a medium saucepan. Bring to a boil over low heat.
2. Simmer, stirring constantly until all sugar is dissolved. Stir in cranberries and rind.
3. Remove from heat and cool to room temperature.
4. Combine with vodka in a large glass container when cool.
5. Store in a cool, dark place for 3 to 4 weeks, shaking every 3 days.
6. Strain and filter prior to use.
7. Store in a glass decanter.
